headline: Unlocking International Flavors (IFF) International Revenues: Trends, Surprises, and Prospects

headline: IFF Opens Vanilla Innovation Center in Madagascar
summary: NEW YORK, May 11, 2026--IFF (NYSE: IFF)—a global leader in flavors, fragrances, food ingredients, health & bioscience—today announced the opening of its Vanilla Innovation Center in Madagascar, reinforcing vanilla as a strategic and priority tonality for IFF and strengthening its ability to innovate at origin.
